table.name: wp_vogo_activate_and_get_updates_calls
table.create-sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `wp_vogo_activate_and_get_updates_calls` ( id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, ip_address VARCHAR(45) NULL, forwarded_for TEXT NULL, user_agent TEXT NULL, request_method VARCHAR(10) NULL, request_route VARCHAR(255) NULL, request_uri TEXT NULL, referer TEXT NULL, server_name VARCHAR(191) NULL, server_addr VARCHAR(45) NULL, host VARCHAR(191) NULL, db_name VARCHAR(191) NULL, cod_activare VARCHAR(191) NULL, current_version VARCHAR(191) NULL, query_params LONGTEXT NULL, body_params LONGTEXT NULL, json_params LONGTEXT NULL, raw_body LONGTEXT NULL, headers LONGTEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (id), KEY created_at (created_at), KEY cod_activare (cod_activare) ) {charset_collate};

table.name: wp_vogo_areas_of_interest
table.create-sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `wp_vogo_areas_of_interest` ( id BIGINT(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, area_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, description TEXT NULL, is_active TINYINT(1) NULL DEFAULT 1, created_at DATETIME NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, position FLOAT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY (id) ) {charset_collate};

table.name: wp_vogo_audit
table.create-sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `wp_vogo_audit` ( id BIGINT(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, user_id BIGINT(20) NULL, username VARCHAR(255) NULL, ip_address VARCHAR(45) NULL, user_agent TEXT NULL, success TINYINT(1) NULL, action_code TEXT NULL, action_info TEXT NULL, created_at DATETIME NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (id) ) {charset_collate};

table.name: wp_vogo_brand_options

column.name: updated_at
column.type: DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

table.create-sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `wp_vogo_brand_options` ( id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, option_key VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL, option_value LONGTEXT NOT NULL, option_description TEXT NULL, option_category VARCHAR(191) NULL, updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (id), UNIQUE KEY option_key (option_key) ) {charset_collate};

table.name: wp_vogo_calendar
table.create-sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `wp_vogo_calendar` ( id BIGINT(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, user_id BIGINT(20) NOT NULL, event_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, location VARCHAR(255) NULL, event_datetime DATETIME NOT NULL, duration INT(11) NULL, participants_names TEXT NULL, done_checked TINYINT(1) NULL DEFAULT 0, created_at DATETIME NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, created_by BIGINT(20) NULL, modified_by BIGINT(20) NULL, PRIMARY KEY (id) ) {charset_collate};

table.name: wp_vogo_category_malls

column.name: category_id
column.type: bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL COMMENT 'Links to wp_terms.term_id / product_cat'

column.name: mall_id
column.type: bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL COMMENT 'Links to wp_mall_locations.id'

column.name: modified_at
column.type: datetime DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE current_timestamp()

table.name: wp_vogo_chat_blocklist
wp_vogo_chat_history
wp_vogo_chat_message
wp_vogo_chat_thread

column.name: last_updated_at
column.type: datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp() ON UPDATE current_timestamp()

table.name: wp_vogo_cities

column.name: modified_at
column.type: datetime DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE current_timestamp()

table.name: wp_vogo_city

column.name: date_updated
column.type: DATETIME NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

table.create-sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `wp_vogo_city` ( id BIGINT(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, position FLOAT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, country VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, county VARCHAR(100) NULL DEFAULT NULL, city_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, population BIGINT(20) NULL DEFAULT 0, date_created DATETIME NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, date_updated DATETIME NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, user_created VARCHAR(100) NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_USER()), user_updated VARCHAR(100) NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_USER()), PRIMARY KEY (id) ) {charset_collate};

table.name: wp_vogo_device_tokens
table.create-sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `wp_vogo_device_tokens` ( id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, user_id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL, device_token VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, platform VARCHAR(32) NULL, device_info VARCHAR(255) NULL, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, created_by BIGINT NULL, modified_at DATETIME NULL ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, modified_by BIGINT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (id), UNIQUE KEY uk_device_token (device_token), KEY idx_user_id (user_id) ) {charset_collate};

table.name: wp_vogo_documents
table.create-sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `wp_vogo_documents` ( ID BIGINT(20) UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, module VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, submodule VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, reference_id BIGINT(20) DEFAULT NULL, user_id BIGINT(20) NOT NULL, server_path TEXT NOT NULL, file_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, file_type VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL, file_size INT(11) DEFAULT NULL, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, created_user BIGINT(20) DEFAULT NULL, modified_at DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, modified_user BIGINT(20) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (ID), KEY idx_user_created (user_id, created_at), KEY idx_module_ref (module, submodule, reference_id), KEY idx_file_type (file_type), KEY idx_created_at (created_at), FULLTEXT KEY ft_file_name (file_name) ) {charset_collate};

table.name: wp_vogo_forum_post
table.create-sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `wp_vogo_forum_post` ( ID BIGINT(20) UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, oras VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL, domeniu VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL, post_author BIGINT(20) DEFAULT NULL, post_title TEXT DEFAULT NULL, post_status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'publish', post_content LONGTEXT DEFAULT NULL, post_date DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), mesaj VARCHAR(1000) DEFAULT NULL, comment_count BIGINT(20) DEFAULT 0, nr_to_read INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, last_answer_datetime DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, post_image LONGTEXT DEFAULT NULL, post_mime_type VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL, post_modified_date DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, post_modified_user TEXT DEFAULT NULL, chat_user_id BIGINT(20) DEFAULT NULL, order_id BIGINT(20) DEFAULT NULL, product_id BIGINT(20) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (ID), INDEX idx_post_status (post_status), INDEX idx_status_lastanswer (post_status, last_answer_datetime), INDEX idx_thread_users (post_author, chat_user_id), INDEX idx_last_answer_datetime (last_answer_datetime) ) {charset_collate};

table.name: wp_vogo_forum_post_answer
table.create-sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `wp_vogo_forum_post_answer` ( ID BIGINT(20) UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, PARENT_ID_vogo_forum_post BIGINT(20) DEFAULT NULL, post_author BIGINT(20) DEFAULT NULL, to_user_id BIGINT(20) UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL, post_answer TEXT DEFAULT NULL, post_status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'publish', message_type ENUM('CHAT','VIDEO','VOICE','FILE','SYSTEM') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'CHAT', direction ENUM('incoming','outgoing') DEFAULT NULL, call_status ENUM('RINGING','ONGOING','ENDED','CANCELED','DECLINED','MISSED') DEFAULT NULL, missed_call TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, call_id BIGINT(20) UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL, channel_name VARCHAR(128) DEFAULT NULL, video_audio_duration INT(10) UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL, call_duration_seconds INT(10) UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL, is_video TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, is_audio TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, post_content LONGTEXT DEFAULT NULL, post_date DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), mesaj VARCHAR(1000) DEFAULT NULL, comment_count BIGINT(20) DEFAULT 0, created_at DATETIME NULL, created_user BIGINT(20) NULL, modified_at DATETIME NULL, modified_user BIGINT(20) NULL, edited_at DATETIME NULL, edited_by BIGINT(20) UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL, deleted_at DATETIME NULL, deleted_by BIGINT(20) UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL, post_image LONGTEXT DEFAULT NULL, filename VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, file_mime VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL, file_size BIGINT(20) UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL, file_url TEXT DEFAULT NULL, message_status ENUM('SENT','DELIVERED','READ','FAILED','DELETED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'SENT', delivered_at DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, read_at DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, client_message_id VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL, post_mime_type VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL, post_modified_date DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, post_modified_user TEXT DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (ID), INDEX idx_post_status (post_status), INDEX idx_parent_date (PARENT_ID_vogo_forum_post, post_date), INDEX idx_message_type (message_type), INDEX idx_to_user_id (to_user_id), INDEX idx_call_id (call_id), INDEX idx_client_msg_id (client_message_id) ) {charset_collate};

table.name: wp_vogo_forum_post_answer_reply
table.create-sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `wp_vogo_forum_post_answer_reply` ( ID BIGINT(20) UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, PARENT_ID_vogo_forum_post BIGINT(20) DEFAULT NULL, PARENT_ID_vogo_forum_post_answer BIGINT(20) DEFAULT NULL, post_author BIGINT(20) DEFAULT NULL, post_answer TEXT DEFAULT NULL, post_status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'publish', post_content LONGTEXT DEFAULT NULL, post_date DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), mesaj VARCHAR(1000) DEFAULT NULL, comment_count BIGINT(20) DEFAULT 0, post_image LONGTEXT DEFAULT NULL, post_mime_type VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL, post_modified_date DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, post_modified_user TEXT DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (ID), INDEX idx_post_status (post_status) ) {charset_collate};

table.name: wp_vogo_forum_post_no_to_read

column.name: updated_at
column.type: DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

table.create-sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `wp_vogo_forum_post_no_to_read` ( id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, post_id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL, user_id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL, nr_to_read INT(10) UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, created_by BIGINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL, updated_by BIGINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (id), UNIQUE KEY uniq_post_user (post_id, user_id), UNIQUE KEY uq_post_user (post_id, user_id), KEY idx_post (post_id), KEY idx_user (user_id) ) {charset_collate};

table.name: wp_vogo_mall_locations
wp_vogo_order_transporter_pos
wp_vogo_order_transporter_rejects
wp_vogo_order_vendor

column.name: order_id
column.type: bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL COMMENT 'FK -> wp_posts.ID (shop_order)'

column.name: modified_at
column.type: datetime DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE current_timestamp()

table.name: wp_vogo_orders

column.name: modified_at
column.type: datetime DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE current_timestamp()

column.name: order_short_description
column.type: text DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Short description of the order'

column.name: relevant_image
column.type: varchar(512) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Representative image URL/path'

table.name: wp_vogo_orders_delivery

column.name: modified_at
column.type: datetime DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE current_timestamp()

table.name: wp_vogo_orders_lines

column.name: product_name
column.type: text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci NOT NULL

column.name: product_id
column.type: longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci DEFAULT NULL

column.name: variation_id
column.type: longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci DEFAULT NULL

column.name: modified_at
column.type: datetime DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE current_timestamp()

table.name: wp_vogo_otps
wp_vogo_product_action

column.name: ICON_CODE
column.type: varchar(500) NOT NULL COMMENT 'font-awsome icon code'

table.name: wp_vogo_product_category_cities

column.name: category_id
column.type: bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL COMMENT 'Links to wp_terms.term_id / product_cat'

column.name: city_id
column.type: bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL COMMENT 'Links to wp_cities.id'

column.name: modified_at
column.type: datetime DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE current_timestamp()

table.name: wp_vogo_product_cities

column.name: modified_at
column.type: datetime DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE current_timestamp()

table.name: wp_vogo_product_malls

column.name: modified_at
column.type: datetime DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE current_timestamp()

table.name: wp_vogo_product_meta_action

column.name: product_id
column.type: bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL COMMENT 'FK to wp_posts.ID (WooCommerce product)'

column.name: product_main_category_id
column.type: bigint(20) unsigned DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'FK to wp_terms.term_id (main product_cat)'

column.name: modified_at
column.type: datetime DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE current_timestamp()

table.name: wp_vogo_product_recommendations
wp_vogo_product_tbl

column.name: modified_at
column.type: datetime DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE current_timestamp()

table.name: wp_vogo_product_vendor

column.name: product_id
column.type: bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL COMMENT 'FK -> wp_posts.ID (post_type=product)'

column.name: modified_at
column.type: datetime DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE current_timestamp()

table.create-sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `wp_vogo_product_vendor` (
`id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `product_id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL COMMENT 'FK -> wp_posts.ID (post_type=product)', `vendor_id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL, `status` enum('active','hidden') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', `created_at` datetime DEFAULT current_timestamp(), `created_by` bigint(20) unsigned DEFAULT NULL, `modified_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE current_timestamp(), `modified_by` bigint(20) unsigned DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`), UNIQUE KEY `uniq_product` (`product_id`), UNIQUE KEY `uq_wp_vogo_product_vendor_product` (`product_id`), UNIQUE KEY `uq_vogo_product_vendor` (`product_id`,`vendor_id`), UNIQUE KEY `uq_product` (`product_id`), KEY `idx_vendor` (`vendor_id`), KEY `idx_status` (`status`), CONSTRAINT `fk_vogo_product_vendor_product` FOREIGN KEY (`product_id`) REFERENCES `wp_posts` (`ID`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE, CONSTRAINT `fk_vogo_product_vendor_vendor_vogo` FOREIGN KEY (`vendor_id`) REFERENCES `wp_vogo_providers` (`id`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ) {charset_collate};

table.name: wp_vogo_providers
table.create-sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `wp_vogo_providers` ( id BIGINT(20) UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, provider_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, provider_slug VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL, term_id BIGINT(20) UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL, user_id BIGINT(20) UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL, accepting_orders TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, status ENUM('active','hidden') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', active TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, legacy_pf_id INT(11) DEFAULT NULL, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, created_by BIGINT(20) UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL, modified_at DATETIME NULL ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, modified_by BIGINT(20) UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (id), UNIQUE KEY uniq_slug (provider_slug), KEY idx_term (term_id), KEY idx_user (user_id), KEY idx_status (status), KEY idx_active (active) ) {charset_collate};

table.name: wp_vogo_push_log
table.create-sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `wp_vogo_push_log` ( id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, user_id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL, recipient_user_id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL, title VARCHAR(255) NULL, body TEXT NULL, payload LONGTEXT NULL, response_code INT NULL, response_body LONGTEXT NULL, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (id), KEY idx_recipient (recipient_user_id) ) {charset_collate};

table.name: wp_vogo_shopping_list
table.create-sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `wp_vogo_shopping_list` ( id BIGINT(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, user_id BIGINT(20) NOT NULL, product_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, product_id BIGINT(20) NULL DEFAULT NULL, vogo_product_vendor VARCHAR(255) NULL DEFAULT NULL, quantity INT(11) NULL DEFAULT 1, other_info TEXT NULL, done_checked TINYINT(1) NULL DEFAULT 0, created_at DATETIME NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (id) ) {charset_collate};

table.name: wp_vogo_support_users

column.name: user_id
column.type: bigint(20) UNSIGNED NOT NULL COMMENT 'WP user ID'

column.name: nickname
column.type: varchar(80) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Short display name'

column.name: created_at
column.type: datetime DEFAULT current_timestamp() COMMENT 'Row creation datetime (DB-managed)'

column.name: created_by
column.type: bigint(20) UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Creator user id (from JWT)'

column.name: modified_at
column.type: datetime DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE current_timestamp() COMMENT 'Last modification (DB-managed)'

column.name: modified_by
column.type: bigint(20) UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Last modifier user id (from JWT)'

table.name: wp_vogo_thread_calls

column.name: modified_at
column.type: datetime DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE current_timestamp()

table.name: wp_vogo_transporters

column.name: modified_at
column.type: datetime DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE current_timestamp()

table.name: wp_vogo_user_addresses
wp_vogo_user_bank_accounts

column.name: modified_at
column.type: datetime DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE current_timestamp()

table.name: wp_vogo_user_document_data

column.name: updated_at
column.type: datetime DEFAULT current_timestamp() ON UPDATE current_timestamp()

table.name: wp_vogo_user_documents_def

column.name: updated_at
column.type: datetime DEFAULT current_timestamp() ON UPDATE current_timestamp()

table.name: wp_vogo_user_email_otp

column.name: expires_at
column.type: DATETIME NOT NULL, -- ex. NOW()+INTERVAL 15 MINUTE

table.name: wp_vogo_user_group_categories
wp_vogo_user_group_users
wp_vogo_user_groups
wp_vogo_user_info
table.create-sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `wp_vogo_user_info` ( id BIGINT(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, user_id BIGINT(20) NOT NULL, company_name VARCHAR(255) NULL, fiscal_code VARCHAR(50) NULL, area_of_interest_id INT(11) NULL, address TEXT NULL, shop_no VARCHAR(50) NULL, floor VARCHAR(50) NULL, building_name VARCHAR(255) NULL, postcode VARCHAR(20) NULL, latitude VARCHAR(50) NULL, longitude VARCHAR(50) NULL, company_doc TEXT NULL, phone VARCHAR(20) NULL, sms VARCHAR(20) NULL, whatsapp VARCHAR(20) NULL, default_city_id INT(11) NULL DEFAULT NULL, created_at DATETIME NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, client_nickname VARCHAR(10) NULL, my_referral_code VARCHAR(50) NULL, used_refferal_code VARCHAR(50) NULL, parent_user_id BIGINT(20) NULL, PRIMARY KEY (id), UNIQUE KEY wp_vogo_user_info_uk_refcode (my_referral_code), KEY idx_vogo_user_info_user_id (user_id), KEY idx_vui_default_city_id (default_city_id), KEY idx_userinfo_myref (my_referral_code), KEY idx_userinfo_used (used_refferal_code), KEY idx_userinfo_parent (parent_user_id) ) {charset_collate};

table.name: wp_vogo_user_pin_code
wp_vogo_vendors_picking_points

column.name: modified_at
column.type: datetime DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE current_timestamp()

table.name: wp_vogo_vogo_category_meta_action

column.name: category_id
column.type: bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL COMMENT 'FK to wp_terms.term_id (product_cat)'

column.name: modified_at
column.type: datetime DEFAULT NULL ON UPDATE current_timestamp()

procedure.name: vogo_sync_woo_users_tovogo

trigger.name: trg_{prefix}vogo_providers_after_delete
trigger.create-sql: CREATE TRIGGER `trg_{prefix}vogo_providers_after_delete` AFTER DELETE ON `{prefix}vogo_providers` FOR EACH ROW INSERT INTO `{prefix}vogo_providers_log` (`audit_user`,`audit_operation`,`id`,`provider_name`,`provider_slug`,`term_id`,`user_id`,`accepting_orders`,`status`,`created_at`,`created_by`,`modified_at`,`modified_by`,`legacy_pf_id`) VALUES (OLD.modified_by,'DEL',OLD.id,OLD.provider_name,OLD.provider_slug,OLD.term_id,OLD.user_id,OLD.accepting_orders,OLD.status,OLD.created_at,OLD.created_by,OLD.modified_at,OLD.modified_by,OLD.legacy_pf_id)

trigger.name: trg_{prefix}vogo_providers_after_update
trigger.create-sql: CREATE TRIGGER `trg_{prefix}vogo_providers_after_update` AFTER UPDATE ON `{prefix}vogo_providers` FOR EACH ROW INSERT INTO `{prefix}vogo_providers_log` (`audit_user`,`audit_operation`,`id`,`provider_name`,`provider_slug`,`term_id`,`user_id`,`accepting_orders`,`status`,`created_at`,`created_by`,`modified_at`,`modified_by`,`legacy_pf_id`) VALUES (NEW.modified_by,'UPD',NEW.id,NEW.provider_name,NEW.provider_slug,NEW.term_id,NEW.user_id,NEW.accepting_orders,NEW.status,NEW.created_at,NEW.created_by,NEW.modified_at,NEW.modified_by,NEW.legacy_pf_id)

trigger.name: {prefix}support_users_AD
{prefix}support_users_AU

view.name: {prefix}vogo_view_woo_orders
view.create-sql: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW `{prefix}vogo_view_woo_orders` AS SELECT `o`.`id` AS `order_id`, `o`.`total_amount` AS `total_amount`, `o`.`currency` AS `currency`, `o`.`status` AS `status`, `o`.`customer_id` AS `customer_id`, `o`.`date_created_gmt` AS `date_created_gmt`, `o`.`date_created_gmt` + interval 2 hour AS `created_at_local`, `o`.`payment_method_title` AS `payment_method_title` FROM `{prefix}wc_orders` `o` WHERE `o`.`type` = 'shop_order'

view.name: {prefix}vogo_products2
view.create-sql: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW `{prefix}vogo_products2` AS SELECT `p`.`ID` AS `product_id`, `p`.`post_title` AS `post_title`, `p`.`post_status` AS `post_status`, `p`.`post_date` AS `published_date`, `p`.`post_content` AS `product_description`, `p`.`post_excerpt` AS `product_short_description`, `p`.`post_name` AS `slug`, `p`.`menu_order` AS `position`, `sku`.`meta_value` AS `sku`, `lookup`.`stock_quantity` AS `stock_quantity`, `lookup`.`stock_status` AS `stock_status`, `lookup`.`min_price` AS `price`, IFNULL(`lookup`.`max_price`, '9999') AS `max_price`, 'public' AS `visibility`, `p`.`post_title` AS `seo_title`, `p`.`post_content` AS `seo_description`, `pm_thumb`.`meta_value` AS `product_image_id`, `img`.`guid` AS `product_image_url`, 'vogo' AS `brand`, `vp`.`provider_name` AS `product_providers`, `vp`.`id` AS `provider_id` FROM `{prefix}posts` `p` LEFT JOIN `{prefix}wc_product_meta_lookup` `lookup` ON (`lookup`.`product_id` = `p`.`ID`) LEFT JOIN `{prefix}postmeta` `sku` ON (`sku`.`post_id` = `p`.`ID` AND `sku`.`meta_key` = '_sku') LEFT JOIN `{prefix}postmeta` `pm_thumb` ON (`pm_thumb`.`post_id` = `p`.`ID` AND `pm_thumb`.`meta_key` = '_thumbnail_id') LEFT JOIN `{prefix}posts` `img` ON (`img`.`ID` = CAST(`pm_thumb`.`meta_value` AS UNSIGNED)) LEFT JOIN `{prefix}vogo_product_vendor` `pv` ON (`pv`.`product_id` = `p`.`ID`) LEFT JOIN `{prefix}vogo_providers` `vp` ON (`vp`.`id` = `pv`.`vendor_id`) WHERE `p`.`post_type` = 'product' AND `p`.`post_status` IN ('publish', 'draft', 'pending')

view.name: {prefix}view_vogo_products_ok2
view.create-sql: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW `{prefix}view_vogo_products_ok2` AS SELECT `p`.`ID` AS `product_id`, `p`.`post_title` AS `product_name`, `p`.`post_status` AS `product_status`, `p`.`post_date` AS `published_date`, `p`.`post_content` AS `product_description`, `p`.`post_excerpt` AS `product_short_description`, `p`.`post_name` AS `slug`, `p`.`menu_order` AS `position`, `sku`.`meta_value` AS `sku`, `lookup`.`stock_quantity` AS `stock_quantity`, `lookup`.`stock_status` AS `stock_status`, `lookup`.`min_price` AS `price`, IFNULL(`lookup`.`max_price`, '9999') AS `max_price`, 'public' AS `visibility`, `p`.`post_title` AS `seo_title`, `p`.`post_content` AS `seo_description`, ( SELECT `pmimg`.`meta_value` FROM `{prefix}postmeta` `pmimg` WHERE `pmimg`.`post_id` = `p`.`ID` AND `pmimg`.`meta_key` = '_thumbnail_id' LIMIT 1 ) AS `product_image_id`, ( SELECT `pimg`.`guid` FROM `{prefix}posts` `pimg` WHERE `pimg`.`ID` = ( SELECT `pmimg`.`meta_value` FROM `{prefix}postmeta` `pmimg` WHERE `pmimg`.`post_id` = `p`.`ID` AND `pmimg`.`meta_key` = '_thumbnail_id' LIMIT 1 ) LIMIT 1 ) AS `product_image_url`, COALESCE( ( SELECT `pma`.`product_main_category_id` FROM `{prefix}vogo_product_meta_action` `pma` WHERE `pma`.`product_id` = `p`.`ID` LIMIT 1 ), ( SELECT `tt`.`term_id` FROM `{prefix}term_relationships` `tr` JOIN `{prefix}term_taxonomy` `tt` ON (`tt`.`term_taxonomy_id` = `tr`.`term_taxonomy_id` AND `tt`.`taxonomy` = 'product_cat') WHERE `tr`.`object_id` = `p`.`ID` ORDER BY `tt`.`term_id` LIMIT 1 ) ) AS `category_id`, ( SELECT `t`.`name` FROM `{prefix}terms` `t` WHERE `t`.`term_id` = COALESCE( ( SELECT `pma2`.`product_main_category_id` FROM `{prefix}vogo_product_meta_action` `pma2` WHERE `pma2`.`product_id` = `p`.`ID` LIMIT 1 ), ( SELECT `tt2`.`term_id` FROM `{prefix}term_relationships` `tr2` JOIN `{prefix}term_taxonomy` `tt2` ON (`tt2`.`term_taxonomy_id` = `tr2`.`term_taxonomy_id` AND `tt2`.`taxonomy` = 'product_cat') WHERE `tr2`.`object_id` = `p`.`ID` ORDER BY `tt2`.`term_id` LIMIT 1 ) ) LIMIT 1 ) AS `category_name`, 'vogo' AS `brand`, `vp`.`provider_name` AS `product_providers`, `vp`.`id` AS `provider_id` FROM `{prefix}posts` `p` LEFT JOIN `{prefix}wc_product_meta_lookup` `lookup` ON (`lookup`.`product_id` = `p`.`ID`) LEFT JOIN `{prefix}postmeta` `sku` ON (`sku`.`post_id` = `p`.`ID` AND `sku`.`meta_key` = '_sku') LEFT JOIN `{prefix}vogo_product_vendor` `pv` ON (`pv`.`product_id` = `p`.`ID`) LEFT JOIN `{prefix}vogo_providers` `vp` ON (`vp`.`id` = `pv`.`vendor_id`) WHERE `p`.`post_type` = 'product' AND `p`.`post_status` IN ('publish', 'draft', 'pending')

view.name: {prefix}view_vogo_orders
view.create-sql: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW `{prefix}view_vogo_orders` AS SELECT `{prefix}vogo_orders`.`id` AS `id`, `{prefix}vogo_orders`.`parent_order_id` AS `parent_order_id`, `{prefix}vogo_orders`.`client_id` AS `client_id`, `{prefix}vogo_orders`.`provider_id` AS `provider_id`, `{prefix}vogo_orders`.`picking_point_id` AS `picking_point_id`, `{prefix}vogo_orders`.`pick_latitude` AS `pick_latitude`, `{prefix}vogo_orders`.`pick_longitude` AS `pick_longitude`, `{prefix}vogo_orders`.`notes_customer` AS `notes_customer`, `{prefix}vogo_orders`.`notes_provider` AS `notes_provider`, `{prefix}vogo_orders`.`notes_transporter` AS `notes_transporter`, `{prefix}vogo_orders`.`city_id` AS `city_id`, `{prefix}vogo_orders`.`total_amount` AS `total_amount`, `{prefix}vogo_orders`.`currency` AS `currency`, `{prefix}vogo_orders`.`payment_method_title` AS `payment_method_title`, `{prefix}vogo_orders`.`status` AS `status`, `{prefix}vogo_orders`.`delivery_type` AS `delivery_type`, `{prefix}vogo_orders`.`created_at` AS `created_at`, `{prefix}vogo_orders`.`end_lat` AS `end_lat`, `{prefix}vogo_orders`.`end_long` AS `end_long`, `{prefix}vogo_orders`.`address_pick` AS `address_pick`, `{prefix}vogo_orders`.`address_end` AS `address_end`, `{prefix}vogo_orders`.`distance_km` AS `distance_km`, `{prefix}vogo_orders`.`calculated_fields` AS `calculated_fields`, `{prefix}vogo_orders`.`created_by` AS `created_by`, `{prefix}vogo_orders`.`modified_at` AS `modified_at`, `{prefix}vogo_orders`.`modified_by` AS `modified_by`, `{prefix}vogo_orders`.`order_short_description` AS `order_short_description`, `{prefix}vogo_orders`.`relevant_image` AS `relevant_image`, `{prefix}vogo_orders`.`provider_name` AS `provider_name` FROM `{prefix}vogo_orders`

view.name: vogo_mobile_categories
view.create-sql: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW `vogo_mobile_categories` AS SELECT `t`.`term_id` AS `term_id`, `t`.`name` AS `name`, `t`.`slug` AS `slug`, `tt`.`parent` AS `parent`, `p`.`name` AS `parent_name`, `tt`.`count` AS `count`, `m`.`meta_value` AS `mobile_category`, CAST(COALESCE(`pos`.`meta_value`, '0') AS SIGNED) AS `position` FROM ((`{prefix}terms` `t` JOIN `{prefix}term_taxonomy` `tt` ON (`tt`.`term_id` = `t`.`term_id` AND `tt`.`taxonomy` = 'product_cat')) LEFT JOIN `{prefix}termmeta` `m` ON (`m`.`term_id` = `t`.`term_id` AND `m`.`meta_key` = 'mobile_category')) LEFT JOIN `{prefix}termmeta` `pos` ON (`pos`.`term_id` = `t`.`term_id` AND `pos`.`meta_key` = 'order')) LEFT JOIN `{prefix}terms` `p` ON (`p`.`term_id` = `tt`.`parent`) WHERE `m`.`meta_value` = '1' ORDER BY CAST(COALESCE(`pos`.`meta_value`, '0') AS SIGNED), COALESCE(`p`.`name`, ''), `t`.`name`

view.name: vogo_ddl
view.create-sql: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW `vogo_ddl` AS SELECT `c`.`TABLE_NAME` AS `table_name`, `c`.`COLUMN_NAME` AS `column_name`, CASE WHEN `c`.`DATA_TYPE` IN ('varchar', 'char', 'varbinary', 'binary') THEN CONCAT(UCASE(`c`.`DATA_TYPE`), '(', `c`.`CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH`, ')') WHEN `c`.`DATA_TYPE` IN ('decimal', 'double', 'float') THEN CONCAT(UCASE(`c`.`DATA_TYPE`), '(', IFNULL(`c`.`NUMERIC_PRECISION`, '?'), ',', IFNULL(`c`.`NUMERIC_SCALE`, '?'), ')') WHEN `c`.`DATA_TYPE` IN ('int', 'tinyint', 'smallint', 'mediumint', 'bigint') THEN CONCAT(UCASE(`c`.`DATA_TYPE`), '(', IFNULL(`c`.`NUMERIC_PRECISION`, '?'), ')') WHEN `c`.`DATA_TYPE` IN ('enum', 'set') THEN `c`.`COLUMN_TYPE` ELSE UCASE(`c`.`DATA_TYPE`) END AS `data_type`, `c`.`ORDINAL_POSITION` AS `ordinal_pos`, `c`.`IS_NULLABLE` AS `is_nullable`, `c`.`COLUMN_DEFAULT` AS `column_default`, `c`.`COLUMN_KEY` AS `column_key`, `c`.`EXTRA` AS `extra` FROM `INFORMATION_SCHEMA`.`COLUMNS` `c` WHERE `c`.`TABLE_SCHEMA` = DATABASE()

view.name: {prefix}vogo_products1
view.create-sql: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW `{prefix}vogo_products1` AS SELECT `p`.`ID` AS `product_id`, `p`.`post_title` AS `post_title`, `lookup`.`sku` AS `sku`, `lookup`.`stock_quantity` AS `stock_quantity`, `lookup`.`stock_status` AS `stock_status`, `lookup`.`min_price` AS `price`, GROUP_CONCAT(`t`.`name` SEPARATOR ', ') AS `product_providers` FROM (((`{prefix}posts` `p` LEFT JOIN `{prefix}wc_product_meta_lookup` `lookup` ON (`p`.`ID` = `lookup`.`product_id`)) LEFT JOIN `{prefix}term_relationships` `tr` ON (`tr`.`object_id` = `p`.`ID`)) LEFT JOIN `{prefix}term_taxonomy` `tt` ON (`tr`.`term_taxonomy_id` = `tt`.`term_taxonomy_id` AND `tt`.`taxonomy` = 'product_provider')) LEFT JOIN `{prefix}terms` `t` ON (`tt`.`term_id` = `t`.`term_id`) WHERE `p`.`post_type` = 'product' AND `p`.`post_status` IN ('publish', 'draft', 'pending') GROUP BY `p`.`ID`

view.name: {prefix}imp_data
view.create-sql: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW `{prefix}imp_data` AS SELECT `imp_data`.`id` AS `id`, `imp_data`.`id_import` AS `id_import`, `imp_data`.`original_producer` AS `original_producer`, `imp_data`.`vendor` AS `vendor`, `imp_data`.`vendor_id` AS `vendor_id`, `imp_data`.`product_name` AS `product_name`, `imp_data`.`description` AS `description`, `imp_data`.`stock_qty` AS `stock_qty`, `imp_data`.`sku` AS `sku`, `imp_data`.`image_url` AS `image_url`, `imp_data`.`price_basic` AS `price_basic`, `imp_data`.`vat_rate` AS `vat_rate`, `imp_data`.`barcode` AS `barcode`, `imp_data`.`coeficient` AS `coeficient`, `imp_data`.`sales_price` AS `sales_price`, `imp_data`.`promotional_price` AS `promotional_price`, `imp_data`.`cat` AS `cat`, `imp_data`.`subcat1` AS `subcat1`, `imp_data`.`subcat2` AS `subcat2`, `imp_data`.`processed` AS `processed`, `imp_data`.`processing_date` AS `processing_date`, `imp_data`.`id_product` AS `id_product`, `imp_data`.`error_description` AS `error_description` FROM `imp_data`

view.name: {prefix}vogo_view_woo_orders_childs
view.create-sql: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW `{prefix}vogo_view_woo_orders_childs` AS SELECT `o`.`id` AS `order_id`, `o`.`total_amount` AS `total_amount`, `o`.`currency` AS `currency`, `o`.`status` AS `status`, `o`.`customer_id` AS `customer_id`, `o`.`date_created_gmt` AS `date_created_gmt`, `o`.`date_created_gmt` + interval 2 hour AS `created_at_local`, `o`.`parent_order_id` AS `parent_order_id`, CAST(`om`.`meta_value` AS UNSIGNED) AS `order_vendor_id`, `o`.`payment_method_title` AS `payment_method_title` FROM `{prefix}wc_orders` `o` LEFT JOIN `{prefix}wc_orders_meta` `om` ON (`om`.`order_id` = `o`.`id` AND `om`.`meta_key` = '_vogo_vendor_id') WHERE `o`.`type` = 'shop_order' AND COALESCE(`o`.`parent_order_id`, 0) > 0

view.name: V_VOGO_PRODUCTS
view.create-sql: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW `V_VOGO_PRODUCTS` AS SELECT `{prefix}posts`.`ID` AS `ID`, `{prefix}posts`.`post_title` AS `post_title`, `{prefix}posts`.`post_type` AS `post_type` FROM `{prefix}posts` WHERE `{prefix}posts`.`post_type` = 'product' AND `{prefix}posts`.`post_status` = 'publish'

view.name: {prefix}vogo_view_woo_orders_lines
view.create-sql: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW `{prefix}vogo_view_woo_orders_lines` AS SELECT `oi`.`order_id` AS `order_id`, `oi`.`order_item_id` AS `order_item_id`, CAST(`p_id`.`meta_value` AS UNSIGNED) AS `product_id`, `oi`.`order_item_name` AS `product_name`, CAST(`qty`.`meta_value` AS DECIMAL(19, 6)) AS `qty`, CAST(`ls`.`meta_value` AS DECIMAL(19, 6)) AS `line_subtotal`, CAST(`lst`.`meta_value` AS DECIMAL(19, 6)) AS `line_subtotal_tax`, CASE WHEN CAST(`ls`.`meta_value` AS DECIMAL(19, 6)) > 0 THEN ROUND(CAST(`lst`.`meta_value` AS DECIMAL(19, 6)) / CAST(`ls`.`meta_value` AS DECIMAL(19, 6)) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS `tax_rate`, CAST(`lt`.`meta_value` AS DECIMAL(19, 6)) AS `line_total`, GREATEST(CAST(`ls`.`meta_value` AS DECIMAL(19, 6)) - CAST(`lt`.`meta_value` AS DECIMAL(19, 6)), 0) AS `discount_total`, CASE WHEN CAST(`ls`.`meta_value` AS DECIMAL(19, 6)) > 0 THEN ROUND(GREATEST(CAST(`ls`.`meta_value` AS DECIMAL(19, 6)) - CAST(`lt`.`meta_value` AS DECIMAL(19, 6)), 0) / CAST(`ls`.`meta_value` AS DECIMAL(19, 6)) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS `discount_percent`, `o`.`date_created_gmt` + interval 2 hour AS `created_at`, `o`.`customer_id` AS `created_by`, `o`.`date_updated_gmt` + interval 2 hour AS `modified_at`, NULL AS `modified_by`, `pv`.`vendor_id` AS `vendor_id`, `vp`.`provider_name` AS `vendor_name` FROM `{prefix}woocommerce_order_items` `oi` JOIN `{prefix}wc_orders` `o` ON (`o`.`id` = `oi`.`order_id`) LEFT JOIN `{prefix}woocommerce_order_itemmeta` `p_id` ON (`p_id`.`order_item_id` = `oi`.`order_item_id` AND `p_id`.`meta_key` = '_product_id') LEFT JOIN `{prefix}woocommerce_order_itemmeta` `qty` ON (`qty`.`order_item_id` = `oi`.`order_item_id` AND `qty`.`meta_key` = '_qty') LEFT JOIN `{prefix}woocommerce_order_itemmeta` `ls` ON (`ls`.`order_item_id` = `oi`.`order_item_id` AND `ls`.`meta_key` = '_line_subtotal') LEFT JOIN `{prefix}woocommerce_order_itemmeta` `lst` ON (`lst`.`order_item_id` = `oi`.`order_item_id` AND `lst`.`meta_key` = '_line_subtotal_tax') LEFT JOIN `{prefix}woocommerce_order_itemmeta` `lt` ON (`lt`.`order_item_id` = `oi`.`order_item_id` AND `lt`.`meta_key` = '_line_total') LEFT JOIN `{prefix}vogo_product_vendor` `pv` ON (`pv`.`product_id` = CAST(`p_id`.`meta_value` AS UNSIGNED)) LEFT JOIN `{prefix}vogo_providers` `vp` ON (`vp`.`id` = `pv`.`vendor_id`) WHERE `o`.`type` = 'shop_order' AND `oi`.`order_item_type` = 'line_item'
